title: Define Sakila subset schema + transform
description: Select Sakila tables/associations for examples; design schema.yml and write a transformation script to export JSON tables.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting work: assess repo structure, plan Sakila subset tables/associations, decide data source and transform approach.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed: added examples/sakila/build_sakila.py (download + transform), examples/sakila/schema.yml with tables/GSIs/associations. Data subset selection: top N customers by rental count; include rentals, payments, inventory, films, film_actor, actors. Source DB URL: https://sq.io/testdata/sakila.db (SQLite Sakila).
